description: Letter fragment. In Hebrew. Asking the addressees to help the Jews and the Conversos (הן ליהודים הן לאנוסים). Dating: Presumably dated to after the Spanish expulsion in 1492. Signed by R. Shelomo Saporta (ר׳ שלמה ספורטה) and [Yaʿaqov b.?] Ḥayyim Astori (אסטורי), whose name has an ornate latin "L" next to it. ASE.
description_he: מכתב בעברית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
